messages.text: Mesh started in Qatar Preset : EU/UK narrow Freq : 869.618 MHz Bandwidth : 62.5 kHz SF : 8 CR : 8 I'm distributing repeaters all around, all with no position :). Anyone intrested HMU (edited)
